title: 'It's like a UFO is over our house at night' — N.J. man says LED billboard ruins neighborhood
description: A resident is urging the borough to address a new LED billboard that is visible from homes and causing nighttime glare, despite prior assurances.

title: Celebrity UFO believers and their freaky encounters – in their own words
description: It’s not just your ordinary Joes who claim to have experienced a close encounter of the third kind. Plenty of celebrities say they have had their own run-ins with aliens...

title: UFO expert claims extraterrestrial arms race is underway
description: A UFO expert has claimed an extraterrestrial arms race is underway with both Russia and China attempting to extract and copy new technology from crashed alien space ships.

title: 1958 Detroit UFO sighting: The chilling report of ‘crystal dome’ hidden in Pentagon files
description: A newly resurfaced FBI memo reveals a bizarre 1958 UFO sighting in Detroit and questions about a ‘crystal dome’ that still defy explanation.

title: What happened to Neil McCasland? The UFO General who vanished without a trace
description: A top US general with UFO links vanishes without a trace, fueling wild theories, deep suspicion, and a mystery that refuses to fade.
